inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating cash flow $19.03B less capital spending $1.21B, divided by 1,773M weighted average diluted shares (10-K filed 2026-02-20)
inputs.normalization_note: Owner cash uses cash from operations minus capital spending; excludes large other non-operating income ($5.8B FY2025) and intangible impairment charges in GAAP net income
inputs.per_share_source: FY2025 OCF $19.0B less capex $1.2B / 1773.0M shares = $10.05/sh; proof-first bridge 2026-07-21.

bear.notes: Biosimilar erosion spreads beyond Humira; litigation reserves rise; debt refinancing at higher rates

base.notes: Skyrizi +50% and Rinvoq +39% FY2025 offset Humira -49%; Q1 2026 revenue +12.4% YoY

bull.notes: Immunology leadership sustains high-teens growth; neuroscience and oncology stabilize; leverage falls

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Stockholders equity $3.27B vs $134B assets; Allergan intangible amortization depresses GAAP book — economic value in product cash flows, not balance-sheet floor (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Operating pharma; pipeline valued through R&D spend, not hidden acreage

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Operating income $15.1B FY2025; all therapeutic areas revenue-positive (10-K product table)

option_scan.question: Backlog / R&D pipeline not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Late-stage immunology and oncology readouts (Skyrizi CD induction, Rinvoq vitiligo/AA) — upside in bull only; not in Lawrence base FCF₀

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Imbruvica/Venclexta J&J and Genentech collaborations; profit share in segment revenue, not separate NAV (10-Q Note 5)

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Humira antitrust and product-liability reserves; non-cash litigation adjustments in OCF reconciliation (10-K cash flow statement)

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Skyrizi and Rinvoq growth already in reported revenue and OCF; Humira decline explicit in filings

growth_explanation.years_1_5: Skyrizi and Rinvoq immunology growth (+50% / +39% FY2025) replaces Humira erosion (-49%); Q1 2026 consolidated revenue +12.4% YoY.
growth_explanation.years_6_7: Step-down as immunology base enlarges and biosimilar pressure spreads; neuroscience and aesthetics provide mix support.
growth_explanation.source: 10-K FY2025 product revenue table and Q1 2026 10-Q MD&A

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

top_dissents.label: Mohnish Pabrai
top_dissents.falsifier: dhando -> none OR net-debt/EBITDA > 3 OR bear return < -15%

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Five additive components map immunology owner cash, other franchises, pipeline options, near-term liquidity, and downside reserve once each.

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from FY2025 10-K: revenue $61.2B, owner cash $17.8B ($10.05/sh), cash $5.2B, total debt $65.0B, diluted shares 1773.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: Immunology product revenue FY2025 (Skyrizi + Rinvoq + Humira)

source.locator: Skyrizi ~$17.6B (+50%), Rinvoq ~$7.5B (+39%), Humira ~$3.1B (-49%) FY2025 product table
Operating cash flow $19.03B less capital spending $1.21B

assumptions.label: Normalized owner cash allocated to this franchise
assumptions.rationale: Immunology revenue share (~46%) of consolidated owner cash; Skyrizi/Rinvoq growth replaces Humira erosion.

assumptions.label: Growth years 1–5 on franchise owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Lawrence scenario envelope from valuation.json.

assumptions.label: Growth years 6–7 on franchise owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Fade as immunology base enlarges or legacy products mature.

assumptions.label: Required return on franchise owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Pharma patent, payer, and leverage risk premium.

assumptions.label: Selling multiple in year 7
assumptions.rationale: Peer-discounted branded pharma multiples on owner cash.

assumptions.label: Component schedule reconciliation factor
assumptions.rationale: Preserves additive component schedule while filing facts anchor owner-cash bridge.

Interest and amortization of debt discount per cash flow statement (approximate)

assumptions.rationale: Negative reserve for Humira antitrust, product liability, IRA pricing, and refinancing stress; not full net debt double-count against owner-cash engine.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of ABBV, including immunology owner-cash engine, other therapeutic franchises, pipeline options, near-term liquidity, and downside reserve.
economic_claim.unit_source: FY2025 weighted average diluted shares 1773.0M per ABBV/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260220_rpt20251231_acc0001551152_26_000008.htm; inputs.shares_outstanding in valuation.json.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating franchises are valued through owner-cash discount paths; pipeline options use risk-adjusted milestones; liquidity and stress reserves are separate overlap keys. Full net debt is not subtracted twice.

economic_value_analysis.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K: GAAP stockholders equity $3.27B vs $134B assets; economic value in product cash flows, not book floor.

component_groups.label: Immunology owner-cash engine (Skyrizi, Rinvoq, Humira)
component_groups.valuation_basis: Owner-cash discount on revenue-proportional immunology share of consolidated owner cash.
component_groups.adjustments: Humira biosimilar erosion and Skyrizi/Rinvoq growth embedded in filing revenue mix.

component_groups.label: Other therapeutic franchises
component_groups.economic_claim: Neuroscience, oncology, aesthetics, and eye care franchises
component_groups.valuation_basis: Owner-cash discount on non-immunology revenue share.
component_groups.adjustments: Segment-level margins are proportional judgments pending indication-level DCF.

component_groups.label: Late-stage pipeline and collaboration options
component_groups.valuation_basis: Aggregate risk-adjusted milestone value less remaining R&D burden.
component_groups.adjustments: Not in Lawrence base free cash flow path; bull sensitivity only.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Base 35% aggregate success on late-stage readouts; low case zero.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Readouts and label expansions over 3–7 years per 10-K pipeline disclosure.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: FY2025 R&D ~$8.3B run rate; remaining capital reserved in aggregate proof.

component_groups.label: Near-term surplus liquidity claim
component_groups.valuation_basis: Cash $5.23B at FY2025; separate from capitalized owner-cash engines.
component_groups.adjustments: Dividend and deleveraging funded from operating cash flow.

component_groups.label: Litigation, biosimilar, and leverage stress reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: Litigation, biosimilar, and leverage stress reserve
component_groups.valuation_basis: Bounded negative reserve; not full net debt NAV subtraction.
component_groups.adjustments: Humira antitrust, IRA pricing, and refinancing stress.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Immunology owner-cash engine (Skyrizi, Rinvoq, Humira)
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of ABBV, including immunology owner-cash engine, other therapeutic franchises, pipeline options, near-term liquidity, and downside reserve.
economic_claim.unit_source: FY2025 weighted average diluted shares 1773.0M per ABBV/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260220_rpt20251231_acc0001551152_26_000008.htm; inputs.shares_outstanding in valuation.json.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating franchises are valued through owner-cash discount paths; pipeline options use risk-adjusted milestones; liquidity and stress reserves are separate overlap keys. Full net debt is not subtracted twice.

economic_value.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K: GAAP stockholders equity $3.27B vs $134B assets; economic value in product cash flows, not book floor.

component_groups.label: Immunology owner-cash engine (Skyrizi, Rinvoq, Humira)
component_groups.valuation_basis: Owner-cash discount on revenue-proportional immunology share of consolidated owner cash.
component_groups.adjustments: Humira biosimilar erosion and Skyrizi/Rinvoq growth embedded in filing revenue mix.

component_groups.label: Other therapeutic franchises
component_groups.economic_claim: Neuroscience, oncology, aesthetics, and eye care franchises
component_groups.valuation_basis: Owner-cash discount on non-immunology revenue share.
component_groups.adjustments: Segment-level margins are proportional judgments pending indication-level DCF.

component_groups.label: Late-stage pipeline and collaboration options
component_groups.valuation_basis: Aggregate risk-adjusted milestone value less remaining R&D burden.
component_groups.adjustments: Not in Lawrence base free cash flow path; bull sensitivity only.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Base 35% aggregate success on late-stage readouts; low case zero.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Readouts and label expansions over 3–7 years per 10-K pipeline disclosure.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: FY2025 R&D ~$8.3B run rate; remaining capital reserved in aggregate proof.

component_groups.label: Near-term surplus liquidity claim
component_groups.valuation_basis: Cash $5.23B at FY2025; separate from capitalized owner-cash engines.
component_groups.adjustments: Dividend and deleveraging funded from operating cash flow.

component_groups.label: Litigation, biosimilar, and leverage stress reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: Litigation, biosimilar, and leverage stress reserve
component_groups.valuation_basis: Bounded negative reserve; not full net debt NAV subtraction.
component_groups.adjustments: Humira antitrust, IRA pricing, and refinancing stress.

limitations: Franchise splits use revenue-proportional owner-cash allocation pending indication-level builds.
Pipeline aggregate remains judgment until indication-level event trees are filed.
